company.name: Stoke Therapeutics
company.subtitle: Zorevunersen P3 EMPEROR (Dravet, mid-2027 readout) · STK-002 P1 ADOA (OSPREY) · TANGO ASO platform; Biogen ex-N.America deal

assets.name: Zorevunersen (STK-001) — TANGO splice-modulating ASO (SCN1A upregulation, IT)

us.reachPct.note: 10% of ~38K US Dravet pool — genetic confirmation >95% via NGS, ASO penetration ~10% of total Dravet population at peak (~3.8K US patients on zorevunersen 2030+). Conservative vs Spinraza early-launch SMA penetration.

us.wtpPct.note: 80% — first disease-modifying Rx for Dravet; precedent set by Spinraza/Qalsody for genetic pediatric ASOs; Medicaid + commercial broad coverage with PA.

us.priceK.note: $400K/yr blended WAC modeled. IT dosing q4mo (3 maint doses/yr after loading). Spinraza precedent $750K yr1 / $375K maint; Qalsody $190K. Dravet's higher unmet need + cognitive benefit supports premium ~$400K blend.

eu.reachPct.note: 8% reach of ~50K EU Dravet pool — Biogen commercializes ex-US/Canada/Mexico. Reach reflects Biogen's territory execution.

eu.wtpPct.note: 70% — EMA orphan pathway; NICE/G-BA reimburse ASOs for pediatric genetic with managed-entry (Spinraza precedent).

eu.priceK.note: $50K royalty-equivalent: Biogen will price ~$250-350K net in EU; Stoke receives tiered royalty 'low-double-digits to high-teens' (~14% blended).

row.reachPct.note: 6% reach of ~60K ROW Dravet pool — Japan PMDA + selected developed Asia/LatAm via Biogen. Lower reach reflects fragmented access.

row.wtpPct.note: 40% — Japan covers ASO orphan; emerging markets limited.

row.priceK.note: $15K royalty-equivalent: Biogen ROW net ~$100K blended × ~14% Stoke royalty.

assets.name: STK-002 — TANGO splice-modulating ASO (OPA1 upregulation, IVT)

us.reachPct.note: STK-002 first-in-class for ADOA; OSPREY P1 ongoing 2026 (US/UK/Japan); 65-90% of ADOA caused by OPA1 haploinsufficiency. ~20% peak reach of ~13K US ADOA pts at 2032+ launch — addresses OPA1-confirmed subset with active vision loss.

us.priceK.note: $450K/yr blended WAC modeled. IVT dosing q6mo. Genetic orphan ophthalmic ASO premium; LHON gene therapy (Lumevoq) cleared $800K+; Spinraza precedent $750K/$375K.

us.wtpPct.note: 65% — orphan ophthalmology with genetic confirmation, no approved DMT for ADOA; payors will require OPA1 confirmation + active progression.

eu.reachPct.note: 15% reach of ~25K EU ADOA pts (Danish/Northern European founder mutation boosts prevalence). Stoke retains global rights ex-zorevunersen — full economics.

eu.wtpPct.note: 50% — EMA orphan; NICE/G-BA managed-entry typical for ophthalmic ASO/gene therapy.

row.reachPct.note: 5% — Japan PMDA orphan + select developed Asia.

row.wtpPct.note: 20% — Japan covered; ROW genetic ophthalmic specialty access limited.

us.reachPct.note: 12% of ~5K US SYNGAP1 pool = ~600 patients. Lead optimization 2026, IND ~2027-28, approval ~2032+. Genetic confirmation rate rising with NGS panels; addressable subset of confirmed SYNGAP1 LoF mutations.

us.priceK.note: $500K/yr modeled — orphan ASO premium; ultra-rare pediatric neurogenetic precedent (Spinraza, Qalsody).

us.wtpPct.note: 60% pre-launch placeholder; genetic confirmation enables clean orphan coverage when clinical data mature.

eu.reachPct.note: 8% of ~7K EU SYNGAP1 pool = ~560 patients. EMA orphan path; conservative reach for preclinical asset.

row.reachPct.note: 2% of ~15K ROW SYNGAP1 pool = ~300 patients. Japan PMDA + select developed markets only.

mega_bear.narrative: EMPEROR Phase 3 fails — zorevunersen does not show efficacy or has unacceptable AE profile
events: ✗ EMPEROR mid-2027 readout misses primary endpoint (convulsive seizure reduction)
✗ STK-002 OSPREY shows no OPA1 protein upregulation in retinal tissue
✗ SYNGAP1 preclinical fails to advance to IND
→ Pipeline collapses to cash floor, dilution to extend runway

bear.narrative: EMPEROR mixed — modest seizure reduction but FDA requires confirmatory trial; ADOA early signal weak
events: △ Zorevunersen meets primary but cognitive secondary endpoints disappoint — narrow approval
△ STK-002 OSPREY shows target engagement but limited functional improvement
✗ SYNGAP1 IND delayed by chemistry / tox
→ Single-product orphan biotech, slow Dravet launch

base.narrative: Zorevunersen P3 positive — first DMT for Dravet, US launch 2028; STK-002 P1 supports P2; SYNGAP1 IND 2027
events: ✓ EMPEROR mid-2027 hits primary (convulsive seizure reduction) + cognitive secondaries
✓ NDA submission 2027, US launch H2 2028 (Stoke commercial); Biogen ex-NA launch H1 2029
✓ STK-002 OSPREY shows OPA1 upregulation + visual function stabilization, P2 starts 2027
✓ SYNGAP1 clinical candidate nominated 2026, IND 2027-28

bull.narrative: Zorevunersen best-in-disease + ADOA platform extension + TANGO franchise builds
events: ✓ EMPEROR clear win: ≥50% seizure reduction + cognitive/behavioral improvement
✓ Zorevunersen $1.2B+ US peak; royalty stream from Biogen ex-NA adds $250M+
✓ STK-002 ADOA P2 positive — first DMT for inherited optic neuropathy
✓ SYNGAP1 IND 2027; TANGO ASO franchise expands (additional CNS targets)

psychedelic_bull.narrative: TANGO platform validated — zorevunersen blockbuster + ADOA franchise + multi-asset CNS leader; takeout by Biogen / Roche / Vertex
events: ✓ Zorevunersen $1.5B+ US peak, dominant Dravet share + label expansion to broader DEEs
✓ STK-002 transforms ADOA care — Lumevoq-equivalent TAM capture
✓ SYNGAP1 + 2-3 additional TANGO programs in clinic by 2030
✓ Big-pharma takeout at $80-120/share (Biogen NA buyback + Roche / Vertex CNS interest)

lastData.title: Q3 2025 results + EMPEROR enrollment timeline update
points: EMPEROR Phase 3 enrollment completion now expected Q2 2026 (delayed from prior guidance)
Biogen partnership Feb 2025: $165M upfront + up to $385M milestones + tiered royalties (low-DD to high-teens) for ex-US/Canada/Mexico
STK-002 OSPREY P1 enrolling US/UK/Japan; EU sites H1 2026; >150 candidates identified
Cash $328.6M Q3 2025 + $48.7M ATM = $377M; runway to mid-2028
SYNGAP1 lead optimization underway, candidate nomination 2026

nextCatalyst.title: EMPEROR enrollment completion (150 patients)
thresholds: Hits Q2 2026 enrollment target → on track for mid-2027 readout
Slips further → readout slips to H2 2027+, cash runway pressure
Also 2026: STK-002 OSPREY initial P1 cohort data (target engagement, safety)

risks: Single high-conviction P3 readout (mid-2027) drives ~70% of valuation — binary risk
Biogen royalty economics dilute ex-NA upside; high-teens cap on Biogen territory
Dravet pediatric ASO faces gene-therapy competition long-term (Encoded ETX-101 AAV; Tevard)
STK-002 P1 ophthalmic ASO has no clinical precedent for OPA1 upregulation mechanism
Cash runway to mid-2028 — bridge financing likely before EMPEROR readout
Dravet caregiver community has strong patient advocacy but ASO IT logistics are challenging

catalysts.title: EMPEROR Phase 3 enrollment completion (150 pts)
catalysts._rationale: Company guided Q2 2026 enrollment completion in Jan 2026 update; on-track signal de-risks mid-2027 readout

catalysts.title: STK-002 OSPREY Phase 1 initial cohort data (target engagement + safety)
catalysts._rationale: OSPREY enrolling US/UK/Japan since 2025; first-cohort data window H2 2026

catalysts.title: SYNGAP1 clinical candidate nomination
catalysts._rationale: Company guided lead optimization underway for SYNGAP1 clinical candidate identification in 2026

catalysts.title: EMPEROR Phase 3 topline readout (Dravet)
catalysts._rationale: Company-guided mid-2027 EMPEROR primary endpoint readout — highest-impact catalyst, drives NDA submission
